terminals.name: Tests
terminals.command: cd /workspace && echo '=== Unity Test Runner ===' && echo '' && echo 'To run ContactManager tests:' && echo '  ./tests/parallel_run.sh --wait tests/test_contact_manager/' && echo '' && echo 'To run a specific test:' && echo '  ./tests/parallel_run.sh --wait tests/test_contact_manager/test_ask.py'
